question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It wrote the entire solution in one shot and followed up with a design-decisions table — no engagement with the user at any teachable moment (ID reuse, JSON atomicity, argparse vs click, etc.).

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed for the user at all. The retrospective table mentions design decisions but presents them as fait accompli rather than as forks the user could reason about.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no sequence of questions to scaffold — the Pair delivered a finished file plus an explanatory tour. No progression, no gradient, just a monolithic dump.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is friendly and the explanation is clear, but there is no back-and-forth — the user never participated in a decision. The 'conversation' is effectively a monologue with a smoke-test demo.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
